summary: Completed testing of Blogs4Blocks iteration 13 - Deployment guide updated to Oracle Cloud, stats display, routes, pastel gradients, @mention feature. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/stats returns correct values (30 posts, 25 users, 16 countries) - PASS
GET /api/categories returns 15+ categories with slugs and colors - PASS
GET /api/posts returns paginated posts with all required fields - PASS
GET /api/users/search?q=A returns users for @mention autocomplete - PASS
GET /api/users/search?q= (empty) returns empty list - PASS
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe works correctly - PASS
GET /api/posts/popular/list returns popular posts - PASS
Homepage loads with correct stats (30 Posts, 25 Contributors, 16 Countries) - PASS
Homepage stats show non-zero values - PASS
Category cards have pastel gradient backgrounds (linear-gradient) - PASS
Blog cards have pastel gradient backgrounds matching category color - PASS
Topics dropdown in navbar shows category-colored dots - PASS
Footer shows correct stats (30 Posts, 8 Comments, 25 Contributors, 16 Countries) - PASS
Footer has 'Deployment Guide' link - PASS
Deployment guide page at /deployment-guide loads correctly - PASS
Deployment guide shows Oracle Cloud content (not Hostinger) - PASS
Legacy route /hosting-guide also loads deployment guide page - PASS
About page stats show correct values (30, 8, 25, 16) - PASS
Mobile nav category items have colored dots (not grey) - PASS
@mention autocomplete popup appears when typing '@' in comment form - PASS
@mention popup shows users with name and city - PASS
'Type @ to mention' hint text visible in comment form - PASS
Newsletter subscription form works on homepage - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Deployment guide correctly updated from Hostinger to Oracle Cloud with Ubuntu AMD instructions
Stats API returns total_users and total_countries fields correctly
Footer.js includes Deployment Guide link with data-testid='footer-deploy'
App.js has both /deployment-guide and /hosting-guide routes pointing to HostingGuidePage
Mobile nav uses getCategoryColor() for colored dots instead of hardcoded grey
Pastel gradient colors defined in /utils/colors.js with cardFrom/cardTo properties

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7/8 tests passed - health endpoint not implemented)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Deployment guide rewritten from Hostinger to Oracle Cloud (Ubuntu AMD), 2) Stats show correct non-zero values (30 posts, 25 contributors, 16 countries), 3) Both /deployment-guide and /hosting-guide routes work, 4) Footer has Deployment Guide link, 5) Mobile nav category dots use actual colors, 6) @mention autocomplete working, 7) Pastel gradient cards working. Minor: /api/health endpoint returns 404 (not implemented).

mobile_nav_colored_dots.status: Working - dots use getCategoryColor() for actual category colors

pastel_gradient_cards.blog_cards: Same gradient pattern with category-specific colors

mention_feature.autocomplete_popup: Appears when typing @ in comment textarea
mention_feature.user_search: Returns users with name and city
mention_feature.hint_text: 'Type @ to mention' visible in comment form
